headline: Has PNC Financial (PNC) Pulled Back Too Far After Recent US Banking Headlines?
summary: Investors might be wondering if PNC Financial Services Group is still priced sensibly after a strong run, or if the stock is starting to look stretched. The shares last closed at US$200.75, with returns of 19.6% over 1 year and 77.7% over 3 years, even as the stock has seen a 12.5% decline over the past month and is 5.1% lower year to date. Recent headlines around US banks have kept attention on large regional players like PNC, with investors weighing interest rate expectations and lending...
